name: slack
description: Integrate Slack communication directly into your Cursor workflow. Check unread messages, read channel histories, search conversations, and send messages without leaving your editor. Uses the slk CLI for fast, keyboard-driven Slack access. Use '/slack' to interact or '/setup-slack' for guided installation.
longDescription:
This plugin brings Slack into your development environment through two powerful skills:

'/slack' Skill:
- Check unread message counts across all channels
- Read recent messages from specific channels
- Search conversations by keyword
- Send messages to channels or DMs
- View thread replies
- All via natural language commands to Cursor AI

'/setup-slack' Skill:
- Guides you through slk gem installation
- Helps configure Slack API tokens
- Tests the setup
- Troubleshoots common issues
- One-time setup process

Perfect for:
- Staying updated without context switching
- Quick status checks during development
- Searching for technical discussions
- Sending updates on deployments/builds
features: Check unread messages across all channels
Read channel history with message count limits
Send messages to channels and DMs
usageExamples: Say 'check slack for unread messages' - Natural language
Say 'search slack for "api bug"' - Search conversations
Say 'send message to #dev channel' - Send messages

requiresSetup.ruby: Ruby must be installed for slk gem
requiresSetup.cursorrules: Skills must be added to .cursorrules file
